title: Forbes Article by Matera CEO
excerpt: Core banking systems are sturdy, reliable, and able to handle complexity. But, they weren't designed to support transactions initiated 24X7. Matera Co-Founder
body:
Core banking systems are sturdy, reliable, and able to handle complexity. But, they weren't designed to support transactions initiated 24X7. Financial institutions who want to meet the modern 'always on' demands of consumers don't have to replace their Core.

Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, outlines three options to replacing a Core system in his latest Forbes article.

Read the full article on [Forbes](https://www.forbes.com/sites/forbestechcouncil/2024/03/20/how-banks-can-rethink-their-core-for-todays-environments/?sh=3fa16e854f86).
